about.description: At 26fitnessClub, we believe in pushing boundaries. Our premium facility offers everything you need to transform your body and mind in an aesthetic, mood-lit environment.

programs.title: Aerobics
programs.description: Aerobics is a rhythmic physical exercise that combines rhythmic aerobic movement with stretching and strength training routines, typically set to music, to improve cardiovascular fitness and flexibility.

programs.title: CrossFit
programs.description: CrossFit is a high-intensity fitness regimen featuring constantly varied, functional movements—like lifting, sprinting, and rowing—performed at high intensity to build overall strength and conditioning.

programs.title: Zumba
programs.description: Zumba is a high-energy fitness program that blends Latin and international music with dance choreography for a total-body cardio workout that feels more like a party than exercise.

programs.title: Dance Fitness Classes
programs.description: Dance fitness is a high-energy workout that combines rhythmic movement and choreographed dance steps with cardiovascular exercise to burn calories while having fun

programs.title: Yoga Classes
programs.description: Yoga is a holistic practice that integrates physical postures, breathing techniques, and meditation to enhance flexibility, mental clarity, and overall physical strength.

programs.title: Pilates Classes
programs.description: Pilates is a low-impact exercise method that focuses on core strength, muscular balance, and precise movement to improve posture and flexibility.

videoGallery.title: Beast Mode: Full Body Workout
videoGallery.description: Follow along with Elite Trainer Marcus for a high-intensity full body smash session.

videoGallery.title: Advanced HIIT Cardio
videoGallery.description: Burn maximum calories in minimum time with this intense 20-minute guided cardio routine.

videoGallery.title: Master the Deadlift
videoGallery.description: Learn the perfect form to prevent injury and lift heavier in this detailed tutorial.

videoGallery.title: 10-Minute Core Crunch
videoGallery.description: A quick, equipment-free core routine you can do anywhere to build functional strength.
